Autoroute Urbaine de Casablanca الطريق السيار الحضري للدار البيضاء
tags.note: Despite its name, this road is NOT a motorway (autoroute) but an expressway (voie-express). It was a motorway at the time of its creation in 1978 (Autoroute Casablanca-Oued Cherrat) but since then it has been changed into an expressway.
